title: vepris myrei
intro: Vepris myrei, a species of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family, is native to tropical Africa and is commonly known as the 'African yellow-wood'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Vepris myrei include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Vepris myrei include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
